zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Fougères於1170年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯福雷-素德時，她的父親Guillaume de Fougères21歲，母親Agatha du Hommet19歲。她和Eudes de Porhoët III至少有3個女兒。她去世於1241年在法國享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fougères
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Armand, Emile, Fleurette, Thierry.

French (Fougère): topographic name for someone who lived in a place densely grown with ferns, from Old French foug(i)ere ‘fern, bracken’ (from Late Latin filicaria); or a habitational name from (La) Fougère, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fugere .

History: Jean Fougère from Poupry in Eure-et-Loir, France, married first Marie Bourg in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) in 1713, and second Marie-Madeleine Belliveau in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1728.

variants.name: Fugere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Celine, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Normand, Philippe, Pierre, Sylvian.
French (Fugère): variant of Fougère (see Fougere ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Fougères was born in 1170, in Fougères-Sud, Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Guillaume de Fougères, was 21 and her mother, Agatha du Hommet, was 19. She had at least 3 daughters with Eudes de Porhoët III. She died in 1241, in France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Fougères est née en 1170, à Fougères-Sud, Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Guillaume de Fougères, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agatha du Hommet, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec Eudes de Porhoët III. Elle est décédée en 1241, à France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Fougères 1170 in Fougères-Sud, Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Fougères 21 und ihre Mutter Agatha du Hommet 19. Sie hatte mit Eudes de Porhoët III mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1241 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Fougères è nata il nel 1170 nel Fougères-Sud, Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume de Fougères, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Agatha du Hommet, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con Eudes de Porhoët III. Morì nel 1241, nel Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fougèresが1170年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスフォウグeレス-スドで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Fougèresは21歳，母Agatha du Hommetは19歳であった。彼女はEudes de Porhoët IIIとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1241年にフランスで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fougères(이)가 1170년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스 포우그e레스-수드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Fougères(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha du Hommet(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Eudes de Porhoët III(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 프랑스에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Fougères nasceu em 1170, em Fougères-Sud, Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Fougères, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agatha du Hommet, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Eudes de Porhoët III. Ela faleceu em 1241, em França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Fougères родилась в 1170 г. в местности фоугeрес-суд, фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Fougères было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agatha du Hommet, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Eudes de Porhoët III. Она умерла в 1241 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Fougères nació en 1170, en Fougères-Sud, Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Fougères, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agatha du Hommet, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Eudes de Porhoët III. Murió en 1241, en Francia, a la edad de 71 años.
